title: Smoky Roasted Dutch Dill Pickles Grill
description: A festive and flavorful pescatarian-friendly dish featuring roasted dill pickles, perfect for a weeknight dinner or special occasion. The combination of smoky grilled flavors and velvety pickles will have you serving this at your next potluck.
instructions: Mix together minced garlic, lemon juice, and honey in a small bowl.
Brush the dill pickles with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Place the pickles on the robata grill and cook for 5 minutes on each side, or until tender and slightly charred.
Transfer the pickles to a baking sheet and brush with the garlic-lemon mixture.
Sprinkle chopped fresh dill over the top of the pickles and drizzle with sour cream.
Return the pickles to the robata grill and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the sour cream is slightly caramelized.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving.
Garnish with additional fresh dill and serve immediately.
